title: pilosella flagellaris subsp. hahnii
intro: Pilosella flagellaris subsp. hahnii, also known as Hahn's false sowthistle, is a plant species within the dandelion family, Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Pilosella flagellaris subsp. hahnii can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or dried extract, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
